---
title: "Theoretical Edge"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default # Other options: grid, table
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false # Optional: turn off banner for the listing page itself
---

Welcome to Theoretical Edge, a blog exploring the mathematical foundations of options pricing, trading strategies, and quantitative finance. Find the latest posts below.
